fieldguide.friendsandfoes.illusioner.des: Illusioners are scheming illagers who have made their home in Taiga biomes. They blind and befuddle their foes, leaving you in the dark and differentiating between fiction and reality.
fieldguide.friendsandfoes.rascal.descrip: A hide-and-seek savant, The Rascal is playful and resourceful. Find it three times, and it will concede some of its great treasures.
fieldguide.friendsandfoes.moobloom.descr: Beautiful and bountiful bovines, Mooblooms spread flowers and joy wherever they trot. Coming in dozens of variants and making friends with bees, Mooblooms are any farmer's best friend!
fieldguide.friendsandfoes.iceologer.desc: A lonely cabin in the middle of the cold wilds sounds like the perfect place to make a home. If an Iceologer doesn't get there first. Beware of glacial strikes and a cold embrace.
fieldguide.friendsandfoes.tuff_golem.red: Have you ever wanted a item frame that feels pain? Why would you want that. You really should investigate that. At least you can dress it up in pretty colours...
fieldguide.friendsandfoes.mauler.descrip: Ever hungering, the Mauler has a taste for meat and juicy, succulent experience. Feed them with caution, though, their fangs get sharper and their bodies grow as they consume.
fieldguide.friendsandfoes.glare.descript: The Glare is a grand and gentle garden of ghoulish green grasses, staring into the darkness of the world as their resentment boils over. Glow berries, though, allow them to kick back a little.
fieldguide.friendsandfoes.crab.descripti: The Crab is a friendly crustacean with a great reach and a fondness for kelp. Their eggs are fragile, but their claws can be added to potions for an extra kick.
fieldguide.friendsandfoes.wildfire.descr: Found in the towering citadels of Nether Fortressess, the Wildfire is a scorching specimen and leader of the Blazes. It will call its allies to assist it, create shockwaves, and is only vulnerable after breaking its armored body.
